settings.heading: Find the right download fast
settings.copy: Browse drivers, utilities, and update files by product and platform without bouncing between pages.
settings.support_note: Use downloads when you need a driver, utility, or update file. If you are not sure which file applies, check compatibility or contact support.

settings.heading: Downloadable resources in one place
settings.copy: Browse files by product and platform so the right download is easier to find.
settings.source_note: Start with product and platform. If the right file still is not obvious, check compatibility or contact support.

settings.heading: Need help choosing a download?
settings.copy: Check compatibility or contact support before installing the wrong file.
